Name: MAIL_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters used to display Archive and Mail messages in-game.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Sender Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: Found in FMG Entries in Menu Text

Fields.Name: Background Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID to use for the background.

Fields.Name: Attachment Category
Fields.Description: The attachment type to use for the 'attached file' element.

Fields.Name: Attachment ID
Fields.Description: The attachment ID to use for the 'attached file' element data.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the page 1 text element.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID to use for the page 1 image element.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Layout
Fields.Description: The position of the page 1 elements.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Block Load ID 1
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 1.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Block Load ID 2
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 1.

Fields.Name: Page 1: Block Load ID 3
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 1.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the page 2 text element.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID to use for the page 2 image element.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Layout
Fields.Description: The position of the page 2 elements.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Block Load ID 1
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 2.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Block Load ID 2
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 2.

Fields.Name: Page 2: Block Load ID 3
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 2.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the page 3 text element.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID to use for the page 3 image element.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Layout
Fields.Description: The position of the page 3 elements.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Block Load ID 1
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 3.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Block Load ID 2
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 3.

Fields.Name: Page 3: Block Load ID 3
Fields.Description: The block load effect to use for page 3.
